_publications._publicationTitle: Optical coherence tomography of the macular ganglion cell layer in children with neurofibromatosis type 1 is a useful tool in the assessment for optic pathway gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Mean age for first reliable VA measurement was significantly lower than for VFI (5.4±1.6 yrs vs 7.3±1.0 yrs; p<0.001)
details: Mean age for first reliable VA measurement was 5.4±1.6 years, which was significantly lower than VFI (7.3±1.0 years; p<0.001)
